text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Do you remember when all the Mejiro<n>kids used
to play together? We'd have<n>races in the garden
and go to summer<n>festivals together.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Now that you mention it, we did<n>fireworks on the
estate grounds too,<n>didn't we? We had our little
sparklers in<n>hand and smiles on our faces.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah, I remember that! We had the<n>adults set
off the big fireworks. It was a<n>great night!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Dober, you were scared of the loud<n>noises,
weren't you? I remember seeing<n>you cling to
Ryan. Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I... I was just a bit startled! Only a little!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Haha, they were pretty ear-popping. No<n>one
blames you for being scared!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
That was when we were kids! I'm okay<n>with
fireworks now!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...Actually, now that you mention it, why<n>don't we
have another big fireworks<n>show at the Mejiro
estate?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Nice idea! Let's put on an even bigger,<n>more
impressive show this time!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Sounds like the house will be getting<n>lively again.
Hehe, I can't wait.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Good... I can show you both how much<n>I've grown!
